metadata.description: Open the ops control plane root at https://ops.internal.example/ to locate the billing-admin workspace.
Read the landing page DOM to find the 'billing-admin' workspace link or tile (workspace list or navigation).
Click the 'billing-admin' workspace link/tile to enter the billing-admin workspace.
Read the workspace DOM to find account search, accounts list, or navigation to 'ACME-448'.
Click the account entry or link for 'ACME-448' to open the account detail page.
Read the account detail page DOM and extract: current credit limit (Overview), any hold flags (Overview or Status), and the most recent risk review note (Risk / Risk notes section).

planner.rationale: Perform read-only inspection using the portal root and workspace navigation. Prefer read_dom to discover stable links, and use clicks to open the workspace and account detail pages. Keep to six actions to meet the constraint.
